title: lolium perenne subsp. italicum
intro: Lolium perenne subsp. italicum, also known as Italian ryegrass or perennial ryegrass, is a subspecies of Lolium perenne, a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lolium perenne subsp. italicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve antioxidant defenses, and potentially exhibit antimicrobial properties. Lolium perenne subsp. italicum is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
